title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Direct

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Direct
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Direct in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Direct:
ICICI Direct is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct!
